name: shure-mcp
description: Local MCP server for guarded room operations and monitoring of Shure installed-audio devices.

tools.name: shure_list_devices
tools.description: List configured Shure devices, rooms, profiles, and safety posture.

tools.name: shure_probe_device
tools.description: Probe TCP/REST health and profile capabilities for a configured Shure device.

tools.name: shure_get_device_status
tools.description: Get normalized status for a configured Shure device.

tools.name: shure_get_room_status
tools.description: Get normalized status for all devices in a configured room.

tools.name: shure_set_mute
tools.description: Mute, unmute, or toggle a device/channel/automixer/coverage area using guarded typed controls.

tools.name: shure_set_gain
tools.description: Set channel or coverage-area gain in dB.

tools.name: shure_identify_device
tools.description: Turn device identify/flash LED on or off.

tools.name: shure_load_preset
tools.description: Load preset 1-10 via REST when available, TCP fallback.

tools.name: shure_get_talker_positions
tools.description: Read active talker positions from MXA REST-capable devices.

tools.name: shure_send_tcp_command
tools.description: Send a documented Shure TCP command string through the guarded safety policy.

prompts.name: shure_room_health_check
prompts.description: Guide an operator through a Shure room status review.
prompts.text: Run a Shure room health check for ${arguments.roomId}. Use shure_get_room_status, summarize device health, call out failed transports, and recommend concrete next steps without changing room state.

prompts.name: shure_mute_sync_diagnosis
prompts.description: Diagnose mute sync across Shure processors, microphones, and conferencing software.
prompts.text: Diagnose Shure mute sync for ${arguments.roomId}. Check room/device status, identify the processor/microphone roles, prefer P300/processor automixer mute state for system mute, and avoid source-muting microphones unless explicitly asked.

prompts.name: shure_camera_tracking_setup
prompts.description: Assess MXA talker-position and camera-tracking readiness.
prompts.text: Assess Shure camera-tracking readiness for ${arguments.deviceId}. Probe the MXA device, try shure_get_talker_positions if REST is available, and explain REST/TCP requirements for talker-position workflows.

prompts.name: shure_safe_tcp_command
prompts.description: Evaluate and run a documented command string through guardrails.
prompts.text: Evaluate and, if safe, send this documented Shure TCP command to ${arguments.deviceId}: ${arguments.command}. Prefer read-only GET commands. If the safety policy blocks it, explain why and suggest the equivalent typed tool when one exists.

shure_config_path.title: Shure config path
shure_config_path.description: Absolute path to a shure-mcp JSON config file.

allow_raw_set.title: Allow raw SET commands
allow_raw_set.description: Enable only for trusted operators. Typed mute/gain/identify/preset tools remain available either way.
